name: Mixmax Gmail Sales Engagement API
what_it_does: Gmail-native sales engagement platform with REST API — providing email tracking (open/click/reply), email sequences, scheduling, polls, and surveys directly in Gmail, with CRM integrations and analytics for sales and customer success teams.
use_cases: Querying email open and click tracking data for sales activity reporting
Managing email sequences and follow-up automation via Mixmax API
Pulling campaign analytics for SDR performance dashboards
Integrating Mixmax activity data with Salesforce for complete sales activity logging
Automating sequence enrollment based on CRM stage changes via webhook triggers
not_for: High-volume cold email with inbox rotation (use Instantly.ai or Lemlist)
Transactional email sending (use Postmark or SendGrid)
best_when: A sales or customer success team using Gmail wants email tracking, scheduling, and sequence automation natively in Gmail without switching to a separate sales engagement platform.
avoid_when: Your team uses Outlook, needs high-volume cold email with inbox warming, or requires advanced multi-channel sequences beyond email.

auth.notes: API key from Mixmax account settings. Passed as Authorization header. Account-scoped access. Webhook for email events (open, click, reply, bounce). No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. Gmail OAuth required for email sending (separate from API auth).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with basic email tracking for individuals
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2013. Gmail-native differentiator — works as Chrome extension and web app. Email polls and surveys unique feature for customer success teams. Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive native integrations. Strong in SMB and mid-market sales teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for sequences, messages, analytics, and contacts. API key auth. Good developer documentation. Gmail OAuth required separately for email operations. Webhook for tracking events. Sequence management includes steps, templates, and schedule configuration.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Sequence reads idempotent. Message status reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Contact enrollment is append-only — check for existing enrollment before adding.
known_agent_gotchas: Gmail-only — not compatible with Outlook or other email clients
Gmail OAuth required separately from API key for email sending operations
Free tier has limited API access — verify plan supports API before integration
Email tracking pixels require recipient to load images — open rates may undercount
Sequence enrollment deduplication important — check existing enrollment before adding

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key auth. Gmail OAuth required — implement proper token storage. Email tracking data is behavioral PII — implement data retention policies. Chrome extension access model requires careful permission review.
